Header files for MemCheck and Valgrind client requests, providing macros and definitions for memory state manipulation and instrumentation framework interaction.


## Files
- **[memcheck.h](memcheck.h.md)**: Header file for MemCheck, a Valgrind tool, providing macros to manipulate and check memory state.
- **[valgrind.h](valgrind.h.md)**: Header file for Valgrind client requests, providing macros and definitions for interacting with Valgrind's instrumentation framework.
